function nearestIndexMonotonic(arr, v) {
  // arr must be monotonic increasing
  if (v <= arr[0]) return 0;
  const n = arr.length;
  if (v >= arr[n-1]) return n-1;
  let lo=0, hi=n-1;
  while (hi-lo>1) {
    const mid = (lo+hi)>>1;
    if (arr[mid] <= v) lo = mid; else hi = mid;
  }
  // v between arr[lo] and arr[hi]
  const dlo = Math.abs(v - arr[lo]);
  const dhi = Math.abs(arr[hi] - v);
  // tie -> first (lower index), matches Excel MATCH(MIN(ABS(...))) behavior
  return (dlo <= dhi) ? lo : hi;
}

function tfdTempAtAlt(baseTempC, baseAltFt, targetAltFt) {
  return baseTempC - 2 * ((targetAltFt - baseAltFt) / 1000);
}

function tfdCumulativeTimeMinutes(pressAltFt, tempC, weightLb) {
  if (pressAltFt == null || tempC == null || weightLb == null) return null;
  const ia = nearestIndexMonotonic(TFD_STAGE1.alt, pressAltFt);
  const it = nearestIndexMonotonic(TFD_STAGE1.temp, tempC);
  const stage1Val = TFD_STAGE1.grid[it][ia];
  if (stage1Val == null || !Number.isFinite(stage1Val)) return null;
  const is1 = nearestIndexMonotonic(TFD_STAGE2_TIME.stage1, stage1Val);
  const iw = nearestIndexMonotonic(TFD_STAGE2_TIME.wt, weightLb);
  let t = TFD_STAGE2_TIME.grid[is1][iw];
  if (!Number.isFinite(t)) return null;
  // Excel: MAX(0, MIN(value, 13500))
  t = Math.max(0, Math.min(t, 13500));
  return t;
}

function tfdCumulativeFuelFromTime(timeMin) {
  if (timeMin == null || !Number.isFinite(timeMin)) return null;
  const X = timeMin;
  return 0.002*Math.pow(X,3) - 0.2524*Math.pow(X,2) + 16.858*X + 1.0903;
}

function tfdCumulativeDistanceFromTime(timeMin) {
  if (timeMin == null || !Number.isFinite(timeMin)) return null;
  const X = timeMin;
  return 0.0065*Math.pow(X,2) + 2.713*X + 0.3566;
}

window.calcTFDSegmentFromInit = function calcTFDSegmentFromInit(initAltFt, targetAltFt, takeoffTempC, takeoffAltFt, takeoffWeightLb, iceVanesYes) {
  // Mirrors Excel Figure 30.1-4 sheet:
  // - Base temp is takeoffTemp (+20 if Ice Vanes Yes)
  // - Temp at altitude = baseTemp - 2°C per 1000 ft from initial/takeoff press alt
  // - Stage 2 uses takeoffWeight (constant)
  if (initAltFt == null || targetAltFt == null || takeoffTempC == null || takeoffAltFt == null || takeoffWeightLb == null) return {time:null,fuel:null,dist:null};
  const baseTemp = takeoffTempC + (iceVanesYes ? 20 : 0);
  const tInit = tfdTempAtAlt(baseTemp, takeoffAltFt, initAltFt);
  const tTgt  = tfdTempAtAlt(baseTemp, takeoffAltFt, targetAltFt);
  const cumTimeInit = tfdCumulativeTimeMinutes(initAltFt, tInit, takeoffWeightLb);
  const cumTimeTgt  = tfdCumulativeTimeMinutes(targetAltFt, tTgt, takeoffWeightLb);
  if (cumTimeInit == null || cumTimeTgt == null) return {time:null,fuel:null,dist:null};
  const segTime = Math.max(0, cumTimeTgt - cumTimeInit);
  const cumFuelInit = tfdCumulativeFuelFromTime(cumTimeInit);
  const cumFuelTgt  = tfdCumulativeFuelFromTime(cumTimeTgt);
  const segFuel = (cumFuelInit == null || cumFuelTgt == null) ? null : Math.max(0, cumFuelTgt - cumFuelInit);
  const cumDistInit = tfdCumulativeDistanceFromTime(cumTimeInit);
  const cumDistTgt  = tfdCumulativeDistanceFromTime(cumTimeTgt);
  const segDist = (cumDistInit == null || cumDistTgt == null) ? null : Math.max(0, cumDistTgt - cumDistInit);
  return {time:segTime, fuel:segFuel, dist:segDist};
}

function tempAtAltitudeFromTakeoff(takeoffTempC, takeoffPressAltFt, targetPressAltFt) {
  if (takeoffTempC == null || takeoffPressAltFt == null || targetPressAltFt == null) return null;
  // ISA temp at altitude: 15°C - 0.0065°C/m * altitude_m
  const isaTemp = (altFt) => 15 - 0.0065 * (altFt * 0.3048);
  const isaDev = takeoffTempC - isaTemp(takeoffPressAltFt);
  return isaTemp(targetPressAltFt) + isaDev;
}


function calcCruise(chartKey, isa, weight, alt) {
    const ch = ETOLD_DATA[chartKey];
    if (!ch || ch.type !== 'cr') return null;
    const isas=ch.i, wts=ch.w, alts=ch.a;
    // Excel behavior: return Out of Range (null) if outside chart bounds (no clamping)
    if (isa < isas[0] || isa > isas[isas.length-1] || weight < wts[0] || weight > wts[wts.length-1] || alt < alts[0] || alt > alts[alts.length-1]) return null;
    const ci=isa, cw=weight, ca=alt;
    const lookup={};
    for(const row of ch.d) lookup[row[0]+','+row[1]+','+row[2]]=row;
    function gv(i,w,a,idx){const r=lookup[i+','+w+','+a];return r?r[idx]:null;}
    function bracket(arr,val){for(let j=0;j<arr.length-1;j++) if(arr[j]<=val&&val<=arr[j+1]) return j; return arr.length-2;}
    const ii=bracket(isas,ci),wi=bracket(wts,cw),ai=bracket(alts,ca);
    const it=(isas[ii+1]!==isas[ii])?(ci-isas[ii])/(isas[ii+1]-isas[ii]):0;
    const wt2=(wts[wi+1]!==wts[wi])?(cw-wts[wi])/(wts[wi+1]-wts[wi]):0;
    const at=(alts[ai+1]!==alts[ai])?(ca-alts[ai])/(alts[ai+1]-alts[ai]):0;
    const result={};
    for(const[field,idx] of[['torque',3],['ff_eng',4],['ff_total',5],['tas',6]]){
        const c000=gv(isas[ii],wts[wi],alts[ai],idx),c100=gv(isas[ii+1],wts[wi],alts[ai],idx);
        const c010=gv(isas[ii],wts[wi+1],alts[ai],idx),c110=gv(isas[ii+1],wts[wi+1],alts[ai],idx);
        const c001=gv(isas[ii],wts[wi],alts[ai+1],idx),c101=gv(isas[ii+1],wts[wi],alts[ai+1],idx);
        const c011=gv(isas[ii],wts[wi+1],alts[ai+1],idx),c111=gv(isas[ii+1],wts[wi+1],alts[ai+1],idx);
        if([c000,c100,c010,c110,c001,c101,c011,c111].some(v=>v==null)){result[field]=null;continue;}
        const c00=c000+it*(c100-c000),c10=c010+it*(c110-c010);
        const c01=c001+it*(c101-c001),c11=c011+it*(c111-c011);
        const c0=c00+wt2*(c10-c00),c1=c01+wt2*(c11-c01);
        result[field]=Math.round(c0+at*(c1-c0));
    }
    return result;
}

// ===== CHART DATA =====
